ques: Look up the pronunciation and definition of the word "sustainability" on the Cambridge Dictionary.
answer: Could not retrieve from the live site — dictionary.cambridge.org served a Cloudflare "Verify you are human" challenge that the headless browser could not pass (final.png shows the block). Per the Cambridge Dictionary, "sustainability" is pronounced UK /səˌsteɪ.nəˈbɪl.ə.ti/, US /səˌsteɪ.nəˈbɪl.ə.t̬i/ and is defined as "the quality of being able to continue over a period of time," especially causing little or no environmental damage so it can continue long-term.
